title: To Heart
description:
Hiroyuki Fujita is an ordinary high school student living a peaceful everyday life alongside his childhood friend Akari Kamigishi and their close group of friends. As graduation approaches and daily life slowly begins to change, Hiroyuki experiences the joys and emotional challenges of growing relationships, friendship, and young love. Through school activities, quiet conversations, and heartfelt moments, he gradually becomes closer to several girls around him, each with their own personalities, feelings, and dreams.

While the story focuses on calm and relaxing slice-of-life moments, it also explores themes of romance, emotional growth, and the importance of human connection. As Hiroyuki learns more about the people closest to him, he begins understanding the value of companionship and the emotions hidden within ordinary everyday experiences. Combining romance, school life, and gentle storytelling, To Heart delivers a warm and nostalgic story about youth and relationships.
